subcodes.first_line: O My loved ones in Há and Mím! Hearken unto the voice of your Lord, the All-Merciful, the Most Compassionate. Verily, He hath not been unmindful of you, and hath remembered you [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا احبائی فی الهاء و المیم ان استمعوا ندآء ربکم الرحمن الرحیم انه ما غفل عنکم قد ذکرکم
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God, @firmness in the Covenant, @call to action
